caption: 今晚不做了。
scene: Sage and Andy slumped close together on the linen sofa, one open takeout box on the low coffee table between them with two pairs of chopsticks resting on top, both with droopy eyelid lines and faint content smiles, shoes kicked off near the table.
bible_hook: §2.6C 太累不想做饭,一盒外卖摆桌上,俩人靠着 (§2.5 tired posture + one bright thing)
rationale: Recent posts leaned hard on work stress and solo work scenes; this brings them back together for a low-key shared-relief moment with takeout, a motif untouched in 30 days.
